---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped protocol or runtime slice
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Boundary

What is the smallest useful slice?

## Accountability Value

What new fact should a third party be able to verify?

## Evidence Carrier

Which signed object, receipt field, artifact manifest, or audit record should carry the evidence?

## Non-Goals

What should this not try to solve?

## Verification

What test or command would prove this works?
